zh.lifeSummary: 當Llewelyn ap Dafydd於1465年出生時，他的父親Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan35歲，母親Margred ferch Ieuan15歲。他於1516年與Margaret Thomas在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安文尼奧結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1548年享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llewelyn ap Dafydd于1465年出生时，他的父亲Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan35岁，母亲Margred ferch Ieuan15岁。他于1516年与Margaret Thomas在威尔士卡馬特史爾利安文尼奧结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1548年享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

en.lifeSummary: When Llewelyn ap Dafydd was born in 1465, his father, Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan, was 35 and his mother, Margred ferch Ieuan, was 15. He married Margaret Thomas in 1516, in Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1548, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llewelyn ap Dafydd est né en 1465, son père, Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margred ferch Ieuan, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Thomas en 1516, à Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1548, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llewelyn ap Dafydd 1465 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan 35 und seine Mutter Margred ferch Ieuan 15. Er hat 1516 in Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Wales Margaret Thomas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1548 im Alter von 83 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn ap Dafydd è nato il nel 1465, il suo padre, Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Margred ferch Ieuan, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Thomas nel 1516, nel Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1548, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Dafyddが1465年に生まれた時，父Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuanは35歳，母Margred ferch Ieuanは15歳であった。1516年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランウィニオでMargaret Thomasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1548年に83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Dafydd(이)가 1465년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margred ferch Ieuan(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1516년 웨일스 카마테실르 랜윈이오에서 Margaret Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1548년 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn ap Dafydd nasceu em 1465, seu pai, Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margred ferch Ieuan, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Thomas em 1516, em Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1548, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llewelyn ap Dafydd родился в 1465 г., его отцу по имени Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margred ferch Ieuan, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Thomas в 1516 г. в местности лланвинио, кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1548 г. в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llewelyn ap Dafydd nació en 1465, su papá, Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margred ferch Ieuan, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Margaret Thomas en 1516, en Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1548, a la edad de 83 años.
